name: Brightstar Resources Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 44% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.3650, stop A$0.2821, target A$0.4050 (0.48:1) — then trail it.
